name: Python
description: Primary language for Django, automation, data processing, and machine learning projects.

name: C++
description: Used for data structures, algorithms, and core programming practice.

name: JavaScript
description: Used for small frontend interactions, filters, and UI behavior.

name: HTML
description: Used for semantic page structure in Django templates.

name: CSS
description: Used with Tailwind and custom styling for responsive layouts.

name: Django
description: Main backend framework for server-rendered pages, forms, admin, and deployment-ready web apps.

name: Tailwind CSS
description: Utility-first CSS framework used to build responsive and polished UI quickly.

name: Bootstrap
description: Used in earlier web projects for quick layout and component styling.

name: React
description: Basic understanding for component-based frontend development.

name: Pandas
description: Used for tabular data cleaning, analysis, and ML preprocessing.

name: NumPy
description: Used for numeric operations, arrays, and ML data preparation.

name: Scikit-learn
description: Used for supervised learning, model training, and evaluation workflows.

name: TensorFlow
description: Learning foundation for neural networks and deep learning experiments.

name: Matplotlib
description: Used to visualize data distributions, model results, and metrics.

name: SQL
description: Used for understanding relational data, CRUD operations, and backend persistence.

name: SQLite
description: Used for local Django development and lightweight project databases.

name: Git
description: Used for version control, source history, and deployment workflows.

name: Vercel
description: Used to deploy the Django portfolio through a Python WSGI runtime.

name: Render
description: Used for deploying Python and machine learning web applications.

name: AWS
description: Foundational cloud knowledge from workshops and learning projects.
